features: Deodorant - Right Guard total defence five combines the five essential benefits of an anti-perspirant into one
Benefits - Alcohol free formula that fights perspiration, prevents odour, long-lasting freshness, adapts to your level of activity and leaves low residue
Total defence 5 - Fights the 5 signs of perspiration: Odour, wetness, stickiness, bacteria and stains (protection against yellow stains)
Powerful - Delivers 30 Percent more protection power and 30 Percent more active ingredients delivered per second compared to Right Guard 3D
Info - Works for up to 48 hours for maximum confidence, dermatologically tested, alcohol-free with clean and sporty masculine fragrance
description: Product Description Right Guard Total Defence five combines the five essential benefits of an anti-perspirant into one. It fights perspiration, prevents odour, long-lasting freshness, adapts to your level of activity and leaves low residue. Delivers 30 Percent more protection power and 30 Percent more active ingredients delivered per second compared to Right Guard 3D. Shake well before use. Use in short bursts. Hold upright 15 cm from underarm and spray. If unit fails to operate rinse nozzle in warm water, make sure it is dry, then use as normal. Do not apply to irritated skin. Ingredients Butane, Propane, Isobutane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Myristate, Parfum, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Sodium Starch Octenylsuccinate, 2-Benzylheptanol, Mannitol, Heliotropine, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Benzyl Alcohol, Coumarin, Citronellol, Phenoxyethanol Directions Shake well before use. Use in short bursts. Hold upright 15 cm from underarm and spray. If unit fails to operate rinse nozzle in warm water, make sure it is dry, then use as normal. Do not apply to irritated skin. Safety Warning Caution: Pressurised container. Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 °C. Do not pierce or burn after use. Do not spray on a naked flame or any incandescent material. Keep away from sources of ignition. No smoking. Keep out of reach of children. Use only as directed. Use in well ventilated places. Do not spray into eyes. Solvent abuse can kill instantly. Extremely Flammable. Box Contains 1 x Right Guard Total Defence 5 Original Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Aerosol, 250 ml (Pack of 6) See more
